_comment: One entry per person. teams = the two TEAM IDs drawn for them (1 from Pot A, 1 from Pot B). Find team IDs via API-Football (GET /teams?league=1&season=2026) or from public/data/matches.json once the fetch job has run. The 'name' inside each team is an optional display hint; live data from the API overrides it. Replace the example below with your 20 people after the draw.
